content: Alpha-lipoic acid is a powerful antioxidant found naturally in every cell of the body.
Alpha-lipoic acid is both water and fat soluble, making it effective in breaking down waste products during cellular metabolism.
A study on obese diabetic patients found that 600 mg of alpha-lipoic acid daily led to a significant decrease in body mass index and fat mass.
Alpha-lipoic acid helps improve insulin signaling and glucose uptake, potentially aiding in fat loss and muscle building.
Alpha-lipoic acid is more bioavailable in supplement form compared to food sources due to its sensitivity to cooking and processing.
The recommended dosage of alpha-lipoic acid is 600 mg per day to enhance glucose uptake and insulin signaling, according to available research and expert opinion.
